title: ayenia divaricata
intro: Ayenia divaricata is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the spreading ayenia or ayenia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ayenia divaricata include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Ayenia divaricata typically involves making a tea or infusion from the leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
